proposed_hypotheses.text: The `treatment_tamoxifen` association with `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 than in ER-negative patients.
The adverse association of `pik3ca_mutation` with `pfs_months` is more negative in patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 than in ER-negative patients.
The adverse association of above-median `ki67_pct` with `pfs_months` is more negative in patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 than in ER-negative patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ covariates + treatment_tamoxifen + er_positive + treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive; coefficient extracted for interaction term.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive: +0.031 months (SE 0.024, p=0.206); result was not significant.
analyses.model: adjusted ordinary least squares with interaction term
